entry.content:
I linked to a terminal music player over at the hub this morning, which I’ve been playing with since then. I say Wow!

It’s got an excellent equalizer and visualizer. You can play any radio stream or pick one from Radio Browser, which I’m familiar with from using Home Assistant. Or play something from your own music library. I discovered a new-to-me Blues stream searching Radio Browser via the player. I like that.

Things like this make me appreciate how I spend my time... and appreciate some people I’m blessed to know. Thanks again mikael!
